attacking_style: Relies on explosive acceleration in final 400m rather than long-range attacks. Demonstrates superior pacing strategy with negative splits in time trial efforts.
team_tactics: Operates from breakaway-supporting team structure but capable of opportunistic wins when break is caught late. Not traditionally set up as protected leader.
terrain_preference: Excels in time trial disciplines and flat sprint finishes requiring explosive power. Strongest when pacing strategy matters over sustained climbing.
vulnerability: Limited observations suggest reliance on tactical racing over raw climbing power. May struggle in high mountain stages where team support for GC contention is needed.
key_patterns: Explosive 400m finishing kick from reduced groups or caught breakaways (2 instances)
Superior pacing strategy with negative splits in TT efforts (Vuelta check comparison)
Opportunistic rather than pre-planned attacks, capitalizing on tactical situations (2 wins from scenarios)
form_trajectory: positive: Most recent 2022 result showed GC capability (2nd) alongside stage win with explosive finish, suggesting evolution beyond domestique role
